name: wxcode-admin-meadow-agri
title: Meadow Agri Admin
description: Original agriculture farm-management admin dashboard — light mode, natural green and earth-amber palette, left sidebar with farm/region switcher, 4 KPI cards, fields status board, yield forecast chart, sensors table, and weather plus tasks side panel.

query.en: Build me a farm management admin dashboard — left sidebar with farm switcher, 4 KPI cards (active fields, yield forecast, soil moisture, tasks due), fields status board, yield chart, sensors table, weather and tasks panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a farm management admin dashboard — left sidebar with farm switcher, 4 KPI cards (active fields, yield forecast, soil moisture, tasks due), fields status board, yield chart, sensors table, weather and tasks panel.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
